attributes.additional_details: Treating any animal the way that race horses are treated is inhumane. There is a high number of fatalities for these horses and they are mistreated through over-exertion and the use of whips and tongue ties, the horses that are bred for racing are prone to injury and hundreds die from the races every year.
attributes.background: I would like the government to ban horse racing and criminalize the act of betting on horse races.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: 
Ban horse racing in the UK and fund transition to lifelong horse welfare safely. https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767059
